rationale: In the citing paper, Park, Ding, and Rao (2008) is cited mainly as an example of another WTP elicitation approach (an upgrading method) that the authors explicitly exclude from their comparison. The citation is used to delimit scope and later to suggest future research extensions, not to build hypotheses, adopt methods, or interpret findings from that paper. Because it serves as a brief boundary-setting reference rather than a core input, the role is mention-level.
